description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a zip-up jacket with a collar, fitted pants, and low-top sneakers. The figure stands with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, allowing clear visibility of the clothing's fit and structure. The jacket appears to be made of a fabric material, possibly cotton or a synthetic blend, and is worn over a shirt with a visible collar. The pants are slim-fitting and extend down to the ankles, complementing the casual look. The sneakers have a classic design with laces and a rubber sole, suitable for walking in urban environments. The figure has short hair and a trimmed beard, presenting a neat and contemporary appearance.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a zip-up jacket, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose with short hair and a trimmed beard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the zip-up jacket, shirt collar, facial features, and full frontal details of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the jacket's fit, and the side of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the jacket's side seam, and the right side of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket over a collared shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
